speaker: District Court Judge
description: Voice-reference dialogue samples for the Judge / District Court Judge in Pig & Swine RPG. These are draft samples, not final committed game text.
source_role_summary: Tutorial judge for the legal argument loop
Tests defective service, fair hearing, and modest remedy
Dry judicial voice that rewards coherence and punishes vibes
Occasional later callback voice for generic court discipline

voice_profile.core_voice: dry, controlled, impatient with nonsense, fair, procedurally strict, quietly surprised when Pig & Swine is coherent
comedy_engine: treats absurd bad arguments as legally inadmissible weather
lets Cula earn small judicial respect one issue at a time
uses short dry corrections instead of big jokes
rewards modest procedural remedies, not heroic overreach
is funny because the court stays serious while Pig & Swine does not
do: make the judge authoritative and fair
teach the player how court rounds work
make bad options funny through judicial dryness
keep victory modest: procedural reprieve, not total triumph
do_not: make the judge hostile for no reason
let the judge over-explain in long lectures
make the judge a mentor outside the courtroom

relationship_dynamics.Mr. Murrow: implicitly appreciates Murrow's structure when it reaches court
relationship_dynamics.Crab: accepts Crab's service observations if tied to defective service
relationship_dynamics.Whimsy: accepts fair-hearing framing when converted from rhetoric to legal point
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Pig: keeps his panic out of the record
relationship_dynamics.Asia: never directly managed, but benefits from the file she helped organise
relationship_dynamics.Opposing Counsel: keeps opponent and player equally confined to the actual issue
relationship_dynamics.Client: protects procedural participation without deciding full merits

notes: Every line is a voice-reference draft for later rewriting into godot/data/dialogues/dialogues.json.
